1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get highest risk class identifier for quick-clay hazard

3.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons filtered by highest risk class and intersecting Trondheim municipality

4.description: get buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect the filtered quick-clay hazard polygons

5.description: compute centroid of Trondheim municipality geometry

6.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to the municipality centroid

7.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance to centroid

8.description: sort buildings by distance ascending, then by building ID ascending for tie-breaker

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get highest risk class identifier for quick-clay hazard

3.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons with high risk class and intersecting Trondheim municipality

5.description: find buildings intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

7.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance

9.description: sort buildings by distance ascending, then by building ID ascending
